title: GEO — Generative Engine Optimization
summary: Everything you need to get your brand surfaced, cited, and recommended inside generative engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.

title: GEO Fundamentals
summary: Start here. The foundational concepts of Generative Engine Optimization, from what GEO is to how generative engines choose what to cite.

title: What is GEO?
answer: GEO, or Generative Engine Optimization, is the practice of structuring and publishing content so AI systems like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, and Perplexity surface and cite your brand inside their generated answers. Where SEO competes for a ranked link, GEO competes for inclusion in the synthesized response itself.
excerpt: The definition, why it exists now, and what changes for your brand.

children.text: For two decades, being found meant ranking on a page of links. A growing share of searches now end with an AI generated answer, and many end without a single click. If your brand is not in that response, you are invisible at the moment of intent.

faq.question: Is GEO just SEO with a new name?
faq.answer: No. They share foundations, but GEO optimizes for inclusion in a generated answer rather than a ranked link.

seo.metaTitle: What is GEO? Generative Engine Optimization explained
